params.prompt: Use the attached reference photo for founder likeness. Create a premium 4:5 Limitless Club PROGRAM GRAPHIC. Concept: Founder AI System Blueprint. Show a realistic human founder in light gray blazer and black shirt, slightly smiling, with a dark graphite AI blueprint/interface behind him. The design should communicate that he teaches founders how to build a team of AI agents. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Keep diagram elements subtle, not too dense. Premium black/silver/blue, readable title, no extra logos, no clutter, no duplicate text.
